attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ACCOUNTING_CREDIT_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.AGREEMENT_REQUIRED_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.AUTO_SCHEDULING_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CONTEXT, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CONTRACT_TEMPLATE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEF_TRANSACTION_PHASE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEFAULT_FULFILLMENT_SET, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEFAULT_INBOUND_LINE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEFAULT_LINE_SET_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEFAULT_OUTBOUND_LINE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.DEPOT_REPAIR_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ENFORCE_LINE_PRICES_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.ENTRY_CREDIT_CHECK_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.FOB_POINT_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.INVOICE_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.INVOICING_CREDIT_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.INVOICING_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.LAYOUT_TEMPLATE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.MIN_MARGIN_PERCENT, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.NON_DELIVERY_INVOICE_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PACKING_CREDIT_CHECK_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PICKING_CREDIT_CHECK_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PO_REQUIRED_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PRICE_LIST_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.QUOTE_NUM_AS_ORD_NUM_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SALES_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SCHEDULING_LEVEL_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SHIP_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SHIPPING_CREDIT_CHECK_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.TAX_CALCULATION_EVENT_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.WAREHOUSE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL,
  (
 select TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL
 minus
 select TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID = STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_OE_TRANS_TYPES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_OE_TRANSACTION_TYPES_ALL)
